message:
🌱 Add metal3-io: Host should be powered down once deleted mission (#1503)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metal3-io-410-host-should-be-powered-down-once-deleted",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metal3-io: Host should be powered down once deleted",
+    "description": "Host should be powered down once deleted. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify metal3-io troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your metal3-io deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metal3-io configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant metal3-io configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl get configmap -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metal3-io\n```\nIf a Host is provisioned (not externallyProvisioned) when it is deleted, we deprovision the server before deletion completes. However, if it is powered on, we do not power it off."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Host should be powered down once deleted",
+        "description": "> Do we want the power off to be attempted before the delete or after?\n\nIt will need to happen after the host has been marked to be deleted but before the CR is removed. We need to wait for cleaning to finish, then power the host off before removing the finalizer from the CR and allowing it to be deleted.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Host should be powered down once deleted is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n metal3-io --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> Do we want the power off to be attempted before the delete or after?\n\nIt will need to happen after the host has been marked to be deleted but before the CR is removed. We need to wait for cleaning to finish, then power the host off before removing the finalizer from the CR and allowing it to be deleted.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "metal3-io",
